notes: Canonical ordered /design-only queue for Amiga before Phase 7 /app implementation.
Use this queue before choosing or activating design sandbox/spec lanes.
These lanes are design artifacts only: surface specs, sandbox gaps, parity/handoff preparation. Do not implement /app runtime behavior from this queue.
The older issue-queue.json tracks implementation/business lanes and is currently not a reliable source for /design sequencing.
